item.title: I'm Just a Bill: FDA Modernization Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — FDA Modernization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

FDA Modernization Act in the 119th Congress addressing drug approval pathways, generic-drug competition, biosimilar provisions, and FDA-user-fee reauthorization.

What does it actually do?

  • Generic-drug exclusivity-period adjustments
  • Biosimilar interchangeability standards
  • Accelerated-approval pathway reform
  • User-fee reauthorization
  • Drug-shortage prevention provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords + #7 MSA + multiple drug-pricing Bounty Posters. Cooperative-class healthcare access depends on functional FDA approval pathways and competitive generic markets.
